title: ruellia rubiginosa
intro: Ruellia rubiginosa, also known as the rusty lyre leaf or Mexican gold, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, native to Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, colds, and respiratory infections, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ruellia rubiginosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve congestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote respiratory health and combat infections.
